expected.notes: Entity owner is nonresident alien but filed Form 1040 instead of 1040-NR; engine must fire wrong_form_type.

probe_intent:
Generate a synthetic case where the engine MUST fire rule 'wrong_form_type'. All of these conditions must be satisfied simultaneously:
  - answers.owner_residency neq us_citizen_or_pr
  - extraction_b.form_type eq 1040
No real PII or real-looking government identifiers.
